parameters.query:
INSERT INTO "PriceLogs" ("ProductID", "MarketID", "SourceTypeID", "ReportDate", "MinPrice", "MaxPrice", "AvgPrice", "ReportedUnit", "StandardizedPricePerKg", "CreatedAt")
SELECT 
  P."ProductID",
  M."MarketID",
  2, 
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  {{ $json.precio_primera }},
  {{ $json.precio_extra }},
  ({{ $json.precio_primera }} + {{ $json.precio_extra }}) / 2.0,
  '{{ $json.unidad }}',
  ({{ $json.precio_primera }} + {{ $json.precio_extra }}) / 2.0,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
FROM "Products" P
JOIN "Markets" M ON M."MarketName" = 'Corabastos'
WHERE P."StandardName" = '{{ $json.producto }}';
